response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload performance analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is predominantly in full-stack web development, DevOps, and open-source tooling, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or AI accelerator system-level optimization.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical education
Extensive experience with performance-critical systems and low-latency applications
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC, IP modeling, or AI accelerator hardware
Lacks background in deep-learning workload analysis or GPU architecture
Education is a BS in CS, but no evidence of 8+ years in hardware/performance optimization roles
